_readme: mostakim-fca library configuration file. Values here override config.json optionsFca section. Edit and restart bot to apply.
_selfListen_note: true = bot responds to its own messages (keep false)
_selfListenEvent_note: true = bot also receives events from its own actions
_autoMarkRead_note: true = automatically mark messages as seen
_autoMarkDelivery_note: true = automatically mark messages as delivered
_autoReconnect_note: true = auto reconnect if connection drops
_forceLogin_note: true = force login even if already logged in on another device
_updatePresence_note: true = send presence updates (uses extra requests, keep false)
_simulateTyping_note: true = show typing indicator before sending messages (looks more human)
_randomUserAgent_note: true = use a different random user agent each time
_persona_note: desktop or mobile — how the bot appears to Facebook
_stealthMode_note: true = bot behaves like a real user — reduces ban risk
_maxConcurrentRequests_note: max number of requests running at the same time
_maxRequestsPerMinute_note: max requests allowed per minute before throttling
_requestCooldownMs_note: cooldown time (ms) when rate limit is hit — 60000 = 1 minute
_errorCacheTtlMs_note: how long to cache errors (ms) — 300000 = 5 minutes
_logLevel_note: silent = no logs | verbose = detailed | silly = everything (use silent in production)
userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
_userAgent_note: browser/device identity sent to Facebook — Android Chrome = appears as mobile
